case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. DOMINIQUE CORBETT

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CORBETT, DOMINIQUE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-16-2015

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORBETT, DOMINIQUE $2,802.19 PRINCIPAL, $284.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,086.19, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
